If you find any security bug or issue in `npltz`, you can privately email me at [harilvfs@chalisehari.com.np](mailto:harilvfs@chalisehari.com.np) or fill out the report form.

**Report Form:** Fill out the [Report Form](https://github.com/harilvfs/npltz/security/advisories/new).

Please don’t open an issue directly for a security issue without disclosing the active security bug/issue privately first.
